title: Ethereal Structures
description: A structure overhaul mod made for the Steampunk Skies modpack.
body:
## What is Ethereal Structures?
### A structure overhaul mod
Ethereal structures is a mod which provides a large ammount of structures and variations (Most of which are ruins), with a common theme.
### A dead world still standing
The overall ambiance thought for Ethereal Structures is a dead world, a world where civilization has long ago stopped thriving, filled with only the remnants of their structures and technologies
### An adventure throughout a forgotten world
Clues are left behind these structures about forgotten technologies and long lost cultures, will you be able to uncover the past in order to progress into the future?
### To see screenshots, go to the <Screenshots> page!
## What is included in this datapack?
- A plethora structures and variations
- Custom loot-tables for chests and custom items that may appear in them
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) compatibility
- [Aetherial Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aetherial-islands) compatibility (No weird generation with the void)
## What to expect of future updates? 
- Sadly, I have lost access to the world and files from the datapack (So I'd have to rebuild everything I had done for the next update without reference). Which means it won't be updated further than the current state. I may remake it in the future.
## Disclaimer
This datapack was made as an addition to a WIP modpack, so it has some mod dependencies. Still, if you have these (commonly used) mods it can be a good addition to any playthrough.
